title: Values, Variables, Constants, Types, Zero Values, and Pointers · Runtime Contract: Constants Iota Representation
summary: A configuration loader must distinguish omitted values, explicit zeroes, constants, aliases, defined types, conversions, and optional fields. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go constants iota representation increment in a typed configuration and value-semantics model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use typed and untyped constants, iota, representability, and explicit conversion without hiding unit or overflow risk.
Choose var, short declaration, assignment, multiple assignment, and lexical scope while detecting shadowed state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
